name: Diamond Genesis Drop #01 — Founder Glyph
description:
Genesis access marker. The first Diamond Genesis Drop — proof you were here before the 1,111 ERC-721 Pass deploys. Holders are placed at the top of the Pass allowlist and receive a permanent founder tag in the members Discord.

Unlockable perk: Pass-allowlist priority + permanent founder tag.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
